2233630.name: Ruinbound
2233630.description:
TAKE A LOOK AT OUR WEBSITE !






Prepare for an immersive adventure as you step into the world of Ruinbound.


The last beacon of hope, the castle, is under threat from relentless enemies.

Protect the castle walls, stop the enemies, and prevent the spread of the corrupted terrain.
Play as various characters with unique abilities, either alone or with friends (1-4 player co-op), strategize to defeat the enemies.

Upgrade your champions, unlock their true potential, and lead them to greatness.
Defend the castle, work as a team, and save the realm in Ruinbound!




CHARACTERS




A close combat master who supports allies with the power of drums! Encouraging allies with supportive melodies, they fight like a shield on the battlefield with sturdy armor and tank-like durability, altering the course of conflict with the power of music.



A tank character that stands out with an aggressive close combat style and robust durability. Inflicting damage across a wide area with the power of flames, it gains superiority over its enemies. Assuming a vanguard role in battles, it executes deadly assaults to lead the team to victory.



A courageous character adaptable to any situation. Challenging enemies with unwavering determination using their trusted firearm, they possess exceptional long-range targeting skills. Proficiently inducing chaos on the battlefield, they effectively eliminate adversaries, leaving behind an explosive impact.



A formidable sorcerer with a focus on elemental powers, particularly ice and lightning. Summons immense attacks by tapping into the power of the sky. Lyra's versatility and command over the elements make her an indispensable asset on the battlefield.
